context.summary: Proof 033 teacher seasoning lesson P033-FLOW-012 for FLOW.

task: SEASON mechanism lesson into the pond. Mechanism=FLOW. Domain=meal_delivery. Observations=orders originate in the kitchen; movement must use the runner route; the checkout choke limits passage; tables receive meals late. Causal chain=Supply appears before a route.; The route must carry the supply forward.; A local limiting point reduces passage.; Upstream accumulation rises while downstream arrival falls.. Consequence signature=arrival rate falls; waiting grows before limiter; far side receives less. Return bounded motifs and lineage only.
